'''Sayer Mon Neela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bureaucrat/Legends|Bureaucrat]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and later joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In the days before [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] became [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], Neela befriended [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Polo Se'lab]]. She vocally opposed Palpatine's policies, and quickly went underground after the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

She, her sons, and her aide [[Raan Stasheff]] eventually joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Neela became a tactician, and her sons were soldiers that died in combat. Neela and Stasheff hid on the Alliance base on the planet [[Horob]], which was working on a prototype sensor. However, the Empire tracked them to Horob and destroyed the base, capturing Neela and Stasheff aboard the ''[[Imperial Hazard]]''. Neela eventually managed to [[Evacuation of Horob|escape]] to the ''[[Starcrossed]]'' and return to the Alliance with a version of the sensor, but Stasheff was injured in the attempt.

She later became the tactical officer for the Alliance base on [[Carosi XII]], where she was reunited with her friend Se'lab.

==Appearances==
